title: Full Engagement Simulation
module_title: Complete PTES Penetration Test from Pre-Engagement to Reporting
learning_objectives: Execute complete penetration test from pre-engagement through reporting
Manage time and scope across 5-day engagement
Balance thoroughness with practical time constraints
scenario: Intermediate capstone. Complete pentest engagement from pre-engagement through reporting. Five days to execute every PTES phase.

scenario_context.setting: Complete simulated pentest engagement with simulated environment
scenario_context.challenge: Execute realistic pentest within time and scope constraints
scenario_context.relevance: Capstone demonstrates readiness for professional pentest engagements

subtasks.title: Pre-Engagement Package
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Develop complete pre-engagement documentation: scope definition, rules of engagement, timeline, communication plan, legal agreements.

subtasks.title: Reconnaissance Phase
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Execute complete reconnaissance: OSINT, DNS enumeration, passive and active scanning. Document all findings.

subtasks.title: Enumeration & Vuln Assessment
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Comprehensive enumeration of all services and hosts. Vulnerability assessment identifying exploitable weaknesses.

subtasks.title: Exploitation Phase
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Execute exploitation chain. Document successful exploits and failed attempts. Establish footholds.

subtasks.title: Post-Exploitation & Escalation
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Post-exploitation enumeration, privilege escalation, lateral movement, sensitive data discovery.

subtasks.title: Final Deliverable Package
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Professional pentest report meeting industry standards: executive summary, methodology, findings, risk matrix, remediation roadmap.

reflection_prompt: How did managing a complete engagement differ from individual vulnerability testing? What was your most significant challenge in the 5-day timeframe?

quiz.question: What is the primary purpose of the pre-engagement phase?
options: Establish scope, rules, timeline, and legal agreement
quiz.explanation: Pre-engagement clarifies scope, rules of engagement, timeline, and obtains legal agreement, protecting both pentesters and clients.

quiz.question: Why is time management critical in a 5-day pentest?
options: To balance thoroughness across all PTES phases within constraints
quiz.explanation: Realistic pentests have time constraints. Effective time management ensures coverage of all PTES phases within engagement window.

portfolio_artifacts: Pre-engagement package with scope and RoE
Post-exploitation report with lateral movement chain
mentor_notes: Capstone requires demonstration of all intermediate skills within realistic constraints. 5-day timeline is tight; time management is critical. Report quality should equal professional standards. This is the final Intermediate mission before Advanced track.
